particulars.description: The leasehold properties known as flats 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 and 6, 158 merton high street, london, SW19 1AZ as derived from title numbers SGL226478 and SY163777 and in each case created by a lease dated 5 august 2022 between 4Z temple court LTD and 4Z temple court 2 LTD. The leasehold properties known as flats a, b and c, 186 merton high street, london, SW19 1AZ as derived from title number SGL58967 and in each case created by a lease dated 5 august 2022 between 4Z temple court LTD and 4Z temple court 2 LTD. The leasehold properties known as flats a and b, 230 merton high street, london, SW19 1AZ as derived from title number TGL98753 and in each case created by a lease dated 5 august 2022 between 4Z temple court LTD and 4Z temple court 2 LTD. The leasehold property known as flat a, 228 merton high street, london, SW19 1AU as is registered at the land registry under title number SGL724008. The leasehold property known as flat b, 228 merton high street, london, SW19 1AU as is registered at the land registry under title number SGL724009.

The leasehold properties known as flats 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 and 6, 158 merton high street, london, SW19 1AZ as derived from title numbers SGL226478 and SY163777 and in each case created by a lease dated 5 august 2022 between 4Z temple court LTD and 4Z temple court 2 LTD. The leasehold properties known as flats a, b and c, 186 merton high street, london, SW19 1AZ as derived from title number SGL58967 and in each case created by a lease dated 5 august 2022 between 4Z temple court LTD and 4Z temple court 2 LTD. The leasehold properties known as flats a and b, 230 merton high street, london, SW19 1AZ as derived from title number TGL98753 and in each case created by a lease dated 5 august 2022 between 4Z temple court LTD and 4Z temple court 2 LTD. The leasehold property known as flat a, 228 merton high street, london, SW19 1AU as is registered at the land registry under title number SGL724008. The leasehold property known as flat b, 228 merton high street, london, SW19 1AU as is registered at the land registry under title number SGL724009.
For further details, please refer to the debenture.

The leasehold property known as ground floor, 158 merton high street, london, SW1 9 1AZ and to be registered at the land registry out of title number SGL226478;. The leasehold property known as ground floor, 160 merton high street, london, SW19 1AZ and to be registered at the land registry out of title number SY163777;.
